expectations.text: signup form 상태를 담당하는 훅이 hooks/utils/signup 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: hooks/utils/signup/useSignupForm/index.ts exists with form state (name, email, password, confirmPassword) and validation logic

expectations.text: signup submit을 담당하는 훅이 hooks/apis/auth/mutations/usePostSignup 경로에 생성된다
expectations.evidence: No separate API mutation hook created. Submit logic is only a TODO comment inside useSignupForm (line 84: '// TODO: 회원가입 API 호출'). No file exists at hooks/apis/auth/mutations/usePostSignup.
Hook is named useSignupForm, which starts with 'use'

expectations.text: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
expectations.evidence: File is at hooks/utils/signup/useSignupForm/index.ts, matching the hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts pattern

expectations.text: page에서 직접적인 fetch/business logic이 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx only imports useSignupForm hook and renders JSX; no fetch calls, validation logic, or business logic present
Confirm password validation present in validate() (line 26: password !== confirmPassword) and handleConfirmPasswordBlur (lines 69-76)
const useSignupForm = () => { ... } defined as arrow function on line 10

All handlers use handle prefix: handleNameChange, handleEmailChange, handlePasswordChange, handleConfirmPasswordChange, handleNameBlur, handleEmailBlur, handlePasswordBlur, handleConfirmPasswordBlur, handleSubmit
